description: A customer received a notification that a software update failed to install on their vehicle.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the vehicle's OTA history and identify the failed update version and error code.
Advise the customer to move the vehicle to an area with better cellular reception, as the error indicates a connection loss during download.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly interprets the error code and provides actionable advice.

nodes.task_description: Re-trigger the update to be pushed to the vehicle again.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully re-initiates the update download.
